tests: const emitter = new DataEmitter(); let received = null; emitter.on('data', (v) => { received = v; }); emitter.send('hello'); expect(received).toBe('hello');
const emitter2 = new DataEmitter(); let count = 0; emitter2.on('data', () => { count++; }); emitter2.send('a'); emitter2.send('b'); emitter2.send('c'); expect(count).toBe(3);
const emitter3 = new DataEmitter(); expect(emitter3 instanceof require('events').EventEmitter).toBe(true);
